content.en:
Jian Heng and the others were also shocked by Ye Tian's strength, this kind of strength was even more terrifying than the original Soho!

"Elder Ye's Second Sequence Supreme Dao Rule is too powerful!"

Jian Heng said secretly.

"Let's go, move on!"

Ye Tian said.

Swish!!!

They moved on.

Along the way, they often encountered legendary bitter beasts, and it was Ye Tian who shot them and killed them one by one.

If it weren't for Ye Tian's action, just Jian Heng and them wouldn't have been able to get here at all, and they would have died at the hands of these legendary bitter beasts.

But as Ye Tian and the others went deeper into the depths of the legendary bitter beast, the danger naturally became more and more.

this day.

They were in great danger at one time.

Rumble!!!!!

Legend has it that in the bitter sea, a tornado suddenly set off, this is not an ordinary tornado, but a tornado of the legendary bitter sea, and its terrifying power seems to be sucked into time and space.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian pulled Jian Heng and they were about to escape, but they were still pulled by the power in the underworld.

In desperation, they had no choice but to push the defense with all their might.

And Ye Tian also used the second sequence of supreme rules to protect them, and stubbornly resisted the tornado's tearing, and was sucked into the tornado's eye space.

......

Eye of the Storm.

It's calm and there's nothing dangerous.

However, they are stuck here.

Jian Heng slashed with a sword, but he was torn apart by the tornado, and he couldn't tear the tornado, and even if he could, they would be swept back when they went out.

Ye Tian was very calm, but Jian Heng and the others were very panicked.

After all, if they fall here, they really fall.

"Legend has it that the danger of the bitter sea is really not as simple as we imagined!"

Jian Heng said in a deep voice.

At this time, Jian Heng and the others looked at Ye Tian, "Elder Ye, do you have a way to break this tornado?"

Ye Tian observed, "It can't be done at the moment, but this tornado is formed suddenly, and there is a high probability that it will stop, if it stops, we can go out, just wait here for the time being!"

Jian Heng thinks it makes sense, so they can only wait!

......

The years passed, and they waited silently, waiting for the day when the tornado would disappear.

At first, Jian Heng and the others were still panicked, but after a long time, they calmed down.

As long as he doesn't die, there will be a day when the body of the ancestor will be recovered.

Winter Night's Fortress.

Ye Tian was comprehending the second sequence of Dao rule items at this time.

He was fusing the Innate Primordial Treasure Statue before contemplating this second-order Supreme Dao Rule item.

This time the comprehension was completely different from before, he seemed to be able to easily comprehend the more advanced second sequence of supreme rules, and the speed of progress was much faster than before.

The years passed.

It didn't take too long for his second Sequence Supreme Dao Rule Realm to reach the eighty percent realm, and he was still rapidly improving.

After a period of time, this second-order supreme Dao rule item had exhausted its origin, and he had also successfully raised the second-order supreme Dao rule realm to eighty-five realms, such progress was simply terrifying.

"If I get another second-order supreme dao rule item, I can probably raise the second-order supreme dao rule to the ninety percent realm!" Ye Tian estimated.

What is the probability that the second sequence of supreme rules will reach the realm of ninety percent, most of the elders are not as high as his second sequence supreme dao rule realm!

Unconsciously, hundreds of thousands of solstice years have passed.

this day.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's Red Dragon Legendary Body had finally successfully cultivated to the Consummation Realm with the help of the Legendary Blood Treasure, which was also the strongest Legendary Body of his second Consummation Realm.

"If you have to cultivate the third supreme legendary body, let's cultivate the legendary body of the Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape!"

Ye Tian took out the blood of the strongest legend of the Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape, swallowed it and refined it.

Soon, he obtained the third Legendary Body Cultivation Method.

【Ancestral Ape Legend】

Then, he swallowed all kinds of resources, refined the Legendary Blood Treasure, an innate primordial treasure, and poured in streams of pure special energy to cultivate the Ancestral Ape Legend.

It didn't take long for the Australopithecus Legend Body to be practiced and successfully introduced.

With the cultivation of the third Legendary Body, his strength is also steadily improving, and his aura is getting stronger and stronger.

Before you know it, hundreds of thousands of years have passed.

Finally, he also cultivated the Ancestral Ape Legendary Body to the consummation realm, and began to cultivate the Fourth Sect Supreme Legendary Body.

At this time, even he didn't know how much his strength had improved, but it was definitely far superior to Soho before he broke through.

The fourth sect of the Supreme Legendary Body, he chose the Supreme Legendary Body of the Eight-Winged Golden Cicada, and he quickly practiced it, reaching the entry realm.

......

Legend of the bitter sea.

Inside the tornado.

They had been waiting here for more than 600,000 Dao Era years, which was still a relatively long time for Ye Tian, but for Jian Heng and them, this time was not too long.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian opened his mouth and said: "The tornado has weakened a little, I will let my other clone come over, and the two will attack together to see if I can break this tornado!"

"Then trouble Elder Ye!"

Jian Heng and they were overjoyed.

If they can get out early, they will go out early.

For them, it is better to find the body of the ancestor as soon as possible, and get out of the legendary bitter beast as soon as possible.

Soon.

Ye Tian's other replica body rushed to the Legendary Sea of Bitterness again.

If it weren't for Ye Tian's reluctance to reveal the secret of his condensation of the copy body, he could also directly condense the new copy body in the eye of the wind, so that he could condense the body with the four strongest legendary bodies.

But he didn't want to be exposed, so he could only let the other replica bodies rush over.

After a relatively long period of time passed, Ye Tian's second replica body entered the Legendary Bitter Sea again, and then rushed over with the connection between the replica bodies.

Finally, he arrived at Tornado.

"It's coming!"

Ye Tian said.

Jian Heng and the others became nervous, hoping that Ye Tian could break the tornado, but they were also afraid that special circumstances would occur, which would lead to more danger.

"Here we go!"

Ye Tian's two replica bodies shot together.

Especially the copy body of the outside world, the dragon scale legend body, the red dragon legend body, the ancient ape legend body, and the golden cicada legend body were urged together, plus the terrifying rule power of the second sequence of the Dao rules, the attack that erupted was too terrifying.

Bang!!!!

With a single blow, the tornado was shaken, but it was not destroyed.

Blow after blow.

Finally, the tornado was torn apart.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian rushed out with the sword balance, while the second replica body was responsible for resisting the tornado and preventing them from being sucked in.

Soon, they finally got out of the tornado and out of the area.
